scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r SCADA/index.html SCADA/js SCADA/css SCADA/Acceso_seguro SCADA/assets dist/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r SCADA/*.ico SCADA/*.png SCADA/*.svg dist/ 2>/dev/null; V=$(date +%s); sed -i.bak -E "s/(\.(js|css))(\"|')/\1?v=$V\3/g" dist/index.html && rm -f dist/index.html.bak; true
scripts.build:gh: rm -rf docs && mkdir -p docs && cp -r SCADA/index.html SCADA/js SCADA/css SCADA/Acceso_seguro SCADA/assets docs/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r SCADA/*.ico SCADA/*.png SCADA/*.svg docs/ 2>/dev/null; touch docs/.nojekyll; V=$(date +%s); sed -i.bak -E "s/(\.(js|css))(\"|')/\1?v=$V\3/g" docs/index.html && rm -f docs/index.html.bak; true
scripts.deploy: npm run build:gh && npx gh-pages -d docs
